case_title: JOHNNY HO ET AL VS. CRAIG ALLEN PARKER ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HO, JOHNNY FOG CITY CAB AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER, CRAIG ALLEN DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-06-2024 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-09-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-14-2024
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-06-2024 CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-29-2025 CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH OCT-24-2025. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON JUL-29-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-25-2025 CONTINUED TO JAN-13-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH DEC-01-2025. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON NOV-25-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR FEB-03-2025. THE JAN-08-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
